purpose: Import, refactor, and unify real non-secret macro substrate inside Microcosm, with metadata and fixtures only as claim-bounded regression scaffolding around verified bodies.

copied_material.claim_ceiling: public macro pattern ledger body import only; not live state authority, private-root equivalence, release, publication, or recipient work authorization
standalone public work-landing command shape only; not live Task Ledger, Work Ledger, Git mutation, or private macro closeout authority
proof body import only; not theorem-solution claim, hosted publication action, or raw macro-root mirror

applied_edits: replace live session log parsers with deterministic public bundle builders
preserve trace span schema, authority ceiling, and validation surface shape
bound claim to public trace construction not live browser, provider, or account access
copied_material.claim_ceiling: public agent-execution trace tool body import only; not live session-log parsing, browser control, provider payload access, account action, source mutation, or release authority

applied_edits: preserve RouteRepairSuggestion route_repair_for build_hook_shadow_coverage and suggestion_message semantics
add public metadata-only bundle loader and view builder around process-audit pattern rows

applied_edits: replace live host session and transcript tail samplers with explicit public metadata bundle ingestion
preserve AgentEvent and AgentTraceStore counters, queue behavior, payload compaction, and active-session summaries
bound claim to public trace-store replay not live provider, browser, account, credential, or recipient-send authority
copied_material.claim_ceiling: public agent-observability trace-store body import only; not live session-log parsing, provider payload access, browser/HUD state, account/session control, credential exposure, recipient send, source mutation, or release authority

applied_edits: copy pure read-only session attribution join into public macro_tools
bound claim to metadata envelopes without raw transcript provider account credential or browser HUD state

applied_edits: copy macro situation route rows into public route-plane bundle rows
preserve route commands, fallback commands, freshness commands, read paths, and provenance fields
exclude live route freshness, source authority, private session access, and release claims
copied_material.claim_ceiling: public route-plane row body import only; not live route freshness, source authority, private session access, whole-system correctness, or release authority

applied_edits: replace macro-root family and mutation-governance imports with deterministic public metadata packet builders
preserve wait kinds, continuation packet path contract, prompt rendering, fingerprinting, and authority ceiling shape

applied_edits: replace live bridge dispatch and host app paste with deterministic public no-send replay

add a deterministic public bundle validator with metadata-only authority ceiling and secret-exclusion checks

omitted_material.reason: Only credential-bearing or account-bound bodies use this omission lane; real non-secret macro bodies use the direct import classification lane.
Operator conversation bodies and provider payload bodies stay out; non-secret macro code, proof, pattern, and receipt bodies do not use this omission lane.

steps.action: Select macro refs as import candidates, not as evidence-only substitutes.
